_meta.note: Full 2026 order from mlb.com/draft/2026/order (75 picks): R1 1-25, Prospect-Promotion-Incentive 26-28, Competitive Balance Round A 29-37, R2 38-66, Competitive Balance Round B 67-74, Compensatory 75. IDs: earliest pick per franchise = base org id; later picks suffixed -<pick>.
_meta.needsSource: ESPN — Kiley McDaniel 2026 farm system rankings + per-team top-10s; needs reflect underrepresented positions in each org's top-prospect ranks. 1B excluded as a draftable need (universally thin, rarely R1 target).
